creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 206356
flow-tools patch for openssl 1.1.x

After upgrade base system to 12.0 flow-tools does not compile because of openssl 1.1.x (in base).

I've found patch which was published on gihub (pld linux project) - https://github.com/pld-linux/flow-tools/blob/master/openssl.patch

I've applied this patch to port. Everything is working good. Portlint does not complain. poudriere returns no errors.

I hope it will be applied soon.
